omitted_declarations.policy_reference: 2.1. We do not share your personal information with third parties other than as follows: (1) with your consent; (2) with third party vendors, consultants and other service providers who work for us and need access to your information to do that work, and are required by contract not to use your personal information other than to provide the services requested by us; (2.1) in the case of Appvestor, use of user data is outlined in full here: https://legal.appvestor.com/privacy-policy/; (3) to (i) comply with laws or to respond to lawful requests and legal process, (ii) to protect the rights and property of Kidslox Inc, our agents, customers, members, and others including to enforce our agreements, policies and terms of use or (iii) in an emergency to protect the personal safety of any person; (4) in connection with or during negotiation of any merger, financing, acquisition, or dissolution, transaction or proceeding involving sale, transfer, divestiture, or disclosure of all or a portion of our business or assets to another company; or (5) in the event of insolvency, bankruptcy, or receivership, your information may also be transferred as a business asset.
